stemHtml: Cleared to runway 27 (slight 4 kt tailwind). Runway 04 is more advantageous. Clear skies, clean runway. What should you do?

options.a: Take off from RWY 27 or request RWY 04 and wait.
options.b: Take off RWY 27 and file an incident report.
options.c: Request RWY 04 and file an incident report.
options.d: Request RWY 04 — it will be granted immediately.
